item.text: I’ll use Blast to enable a focused marksman kill, advance both home raiders into the center lane, and recruit another raider with the remaining supply lead.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-011.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-011\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-011.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-011.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-011.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-011\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":4}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":2}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"target\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-1\",\"target\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-011.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-011.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-011.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-011.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-011.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, recruited another raider, and used two forward raiders to remove P2'"'s marksman from the center.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use capped Blast damage across multiple attacks, eliminate P2's center marksman, flood more raiders toward the fight, and keep converting supply into immediate board pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-011.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-011.board.result.json"'

item.text: The second raider’s flank route was one step too long. I’m keeping the committed deck result and switching to the valid pressure line: damage the center marksman, reinforce the lane, and recruit.

RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided

bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-011.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-011.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, recruited another raider, advanced reinforcements, and heavily damaged P2'"'s marksman on the center.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: apply capped Blast damage immediately, keep raiders flowing into the middle, spend supply on another attacker, and leave P2's center marksman nearly dead for the next pressure wave.\" --strict-win

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-011`.

Deck line: played `blast`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `5` money and `2` damage.

Board line: moved raiders to `(7,5)`, `(8,3)`, and `(8,2)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-011-1` at `(10,1)`, and hit `P2-marksman-start-4` for `7` damage with capped Blast damage.

Rationale: this keeps the rush posture by spending supply on another raider, reinforcing the center lane, and leaving P2’s center marksman nearly dead for the next pressure wave. Strict validation passed.
